name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Backup needed on ② fights to come >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e08496/7145696/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all")
---

Peter,

As of yesterday, the GOP plan to repeal Obamacare is hidden under lock and key somewhere in the U.S. Capitol.

Yes, really.

Congressional Republicans are putting together the plan that will affect millions of Americans' health insurance in secret, and they aren't even letting some members of _their own party_ see it.

We've expected the Obamacare repeal bill to be bad, but we need to be prepared for the worst. And we HAVE to be ready to fight back.

**[The effects of repealing Obamacare could be felt for years. Donate $3 today to send our pro-choice Democratic women backup in Congress and state legislatures nationwide.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e08497/7145696/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170303_email_ACALeak?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+The+effects+of+repealing+Obamacare+could&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all")**

Despite the GOP's secrecy, here's what we've heard about their plan:

**#1** It would end the Medicaid expansion that's covering millions of women and families across the country
**#2** It would allow providers to charge the elderly up to five times more than younger people for treatment
**#3** And it would defund Planned Parenthood, ending access to safe abortions as well as basic health care for millions

The only silver lining is that we know our elected EMILY's List women will fight this tooth and nail.

For years, Republicans have been fighting to defund Planned Parenthood at the state level. Each time they try, EMILY's List women in state legislatures have taken a stand. Congressional Republicans have voted repeatedly to defund Planned Parenthood and repeal Obamacare at the federal level. And so far, our women have successfully fought it every time.

But when Republicans control the House, the Senate, the presidency, and many state legislatures across the country, even our most vocal elected officials can't stop it.

That's why we need to keep electing as many pro-choice Democratic women as possible.

**Donate $3 now to send our EMILY's List women backup for the Obamacare and Planned Parenthood fights to come:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/GOP-Obamacare-Plan](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e08490/7145696/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170303_email_ACALeak?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGOPObamacarePlan&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e08491/7145696/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170303_email_ACALeak?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e08492/7145696/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e08493/7145696/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c41/24c69fd9/f5cc606b/18e0848c/7145696/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all&source=WQEFE304N_digital_email_20170303_ACALeak_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump Aboard the PCU Gerald R. Ford
body:
Watch President Trump's historic weekly address. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76fd5b3710f558df912e07f845a4988c48063b7a9ed4fa2f115acae7fc60851f7fdbdc594de9face253cbcbaccb0a2f89b0aedf722f61f69)

On Thursday, President Donald J. Trump visited our Nation’s newest aircraft carrier, the soon-to-be commissioned U.S.S. _Gerald R. Ford_. These carriers are the centerpiece of American military might, and this beautiful new warship represents the future of naval aviation that will serve as a cornerstone of our national defense for decades to come.

A famous aviator once wrote that to build a truly great ship, we shouldn’t begin by gathering wood, cutting boards, or distributing work, but instead by awakening within the people a “desire for the vast and endless sea.”

In the same way, just as President Trump outlined in his Joint Address on Tuesday, we must continue to renew the American spirit within ourselves in order to rebuild our country.

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76fd5b3710f558df912e07f845a4988c48063b7a9ed4fa2f115acae7fc60851f7fdbdc594de9face253cbcbaccb0a2f89b0aedf722f61f69)
Investing in the military means investing in peace, and it is an investment in the incredible men and women who serve every day to keep our country safe.

These are exciting times and amazing opportunities are unfolding before us. If we all work together, then anything is possible.

**[To hear from President Trump about his experience aboard the PCU _Gerald R. Ford_ , watch his weekly address here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76fd5b3710f558df2707e44267312d99c15b77ef4dacc57ae22cbdb7750cddd3db57fbb1dafb1f488d9bcb5a20e8125c1f56d44f5806d0cd)**

**[Watch Now](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76fd5b3710f558df912e07f845a4988c48063b7a9ed4fa2f115acae7fc60851f7fdbdc594de9face253cbcbaccb0a2f89b0aedf722f61f69)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76fd5b3710f558dfb21955d868032cff8904ae25377f96abbd39559a281a7fa987204d58e9f96d883bba214f6706985a18988b8e34e43ca1) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=76fd5b3710f558dfab41d39b9cbcef47cd34b586e3eb33912c4570e19ecb25b2942df053e0ea70aa05e6dc74a0137d1addce028d18747272)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4068109d6bbc6dd770a1a9a7ca00556c0d1f9d81aea6e2123720a23077f8aff844e147aad2fa7268f284d0c02af7f0a3a)

name: Democrats.org
subject: LEAKED: The GOP's plan to "fix" health care →
disclaimer_text: paid for by cutting an additional $370 billion from Medicaid over the next ten years
body:
The GOP's replacement plan is about as bad as you could expect
---
**Add your name and stand with Democrats to protect the Affordable Care Act.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170304_ew_nd&source=em_20170304_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Republicans have been clamoring for years to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- even if it meant kicking millions of Americans off their health coverage. They've promised to replace it with something, but have never revealed the details of their plan.

House Republicans released their plan on Thursday -- but you won't be able to find it online. The GOP leadership hid the bill in the Capitol, moving it between a series of offices like a hot potato, so Democrats and even some Republicans couldn't read it.

But last weekend, some of the details leaked -- and it's about as bad as you could expect:

* If you aren't one of the millions to lose coverage, you can expect your premiums to rise and the subsidy to help pay for insurance to decline.

* If you get your health insurance from your employer, you'll pay higher taxes on those benefits.

* The Medicaid expansion will be reduced drastically, as will all Medicaid benefits and eligibility. (By the way, a whopping 84% of Americans support keeping the Medicaid expansion the way it is.)

The GOP did manage to include one bright spot for millionaires and billionaires: a huge tax cut averaging $50,000 per millionaire, to be paid for by cutting an additional $370 billion from Medicaid over the next ten years.

It's clear that the GOP's health care plan would be catastrophic for the vast majority of Americans, and it's not hard to see why tens of thousands of Americans showed up at town halls just this past week to tell their members of Congress not to take their health care away.

**So when Republicans emerge from the basement lair where they're plotting to destroy our health care system, let's make sure they know we won't let them do it without a fight. Add your name to stand with Democrats and commit to protecting the Affordable Care Act:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170304_ew_nd&source=em_20170304_ew_nd")**
The battle to save the Affordable Care Act is just getting started. Thanks for standing up.

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c436/4067b0a/2d180d5b4/7e7c8332/1025888677/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170304_ew_nd&source=em_20170304_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c436/4067b0a/2d180d5b4/7e7c8333/1025888677/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170304_ew_nd&source=em_20170304_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c436/4067b0a/2d180d5b4/7e7c8330/1025888677/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170304_ew_nd&source=em_20170304_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c436/4067b0a/2d180d5b4/7e7c8331/1025888677/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170304_ew_nd&source=em_20170304_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Tom Perez
subject: I want to hear from you
body:
Make your voice heard today.
---
**Share your thoughts and ideas with the new DNC Chair.

** **[LET TOM KNOW](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Let-Me-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+LET+TOM+KNOW&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd")**
I've been around some great leaders in my time -- my old bosses Barack Obama and Ted Kennedy were two of them. They taught me that in order to lead, a good leader must listen. It's the most important ingredient in the kind of culture change that the DNC needs today.

Over the last couple of months, I've talked with party leaders, local officials, and supporters like you all across the country. And like many of you, when it comes to how we build a Democratic Party for the future, I have as many questions as I have answers.

That's why I want to hear from you today: **[what do you think our priorities should be? What are the most urgent challenges we need to meet?](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Let-Me-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+what+do+you+think+our+priorities+should+&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd")**

I want to make sure this party has a place for everyone, and I want to see a level of involvement from the grassroots on up like we've never seen before. That's the only way we can turn around the Democratic Party and beat the GOP in all 50 states, seven territories, and the District of Columbia.

**So let me know what you think!**

**[LET TOM KNOW](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Let-Me-Know1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+LET+TOM+KNOW&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd")**
Thanks for stepping up to the plate. I'm excited to do this work together.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c431/4067b0a/2d17b42b9/7e7c820f/4145030210/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c431/4067b0a/2d17b42b9/7e7c820c/4145030210/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c431/4067b0a/2d17b42b9/7e7c820d/4145030210/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c431/4067b0a/2d17b42b9/7e7c820a/4145030210/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170304_tp_nd&source=em_20170304_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: URGENT ALERT (via DSCC)
subject: Shutting out the public (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republicans won't let anyone see their plan to replace Obamacare. We need to be ready to fight back when it's revealed. Republicans won't let anyone see their plan to replace Obamacare. We need to be ready to fight back when it's revealed.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-aca-repeal?refcode=DPE-20170304-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

After disparaging Obamacare for 7 years, Republicans finally came up with a replacement plan.

Except now, they won't let anyone see it. They're guarding the draft repeal bill in a secret room away from the public.

Instead of putting their proposal out in the open, after thousands stormed town halls demanding answers about their health coverage, they want to keep the details hidden -- to make it harder for any opposition to organize.

We won't know how damaging it will be until the last minute, which means we must get resources ready to build enough counter pressure to stop it.

**[Chip in $1 to show you'll fight tooth and nail to protect the Affordable Care Act. We need every Democrat standing with us.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-aca-repeal?refcode=DPE-20170304-UrgentAlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Even Donald Trump admitted "nobody knew health care could be so complicated." Yet Republicans continue to recklessly forge ahead on replacing Obamacare without a thorough process.

They want to bring this bill to the floor as early as next week and bypass the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office's review -- and it's no wonder why: the CBO gave a terrible forecast for the last GOP health care proposal, citing millions losing insurance, premiums skyrocketing, and quality of care diminishing.

No one has that mandate to jeopardize the health coverage of 32 million people by taking it into their own hands and treating it like a top secret.

So to make sure this plan receives the scrutiny it deserves, we must be ready to act quickly and push back before Republicans force a vote.

clean_body: Republicans won't let anyone see their plan to replace Obamacare. We need to be ready to fight back when it's revealed. Republicans won't let anyone see their plan to replace Obamacare. We need to be ready to fight back when it's revealed. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Friend -- After disparaging Obamacare for 7 years, Republicans finally came up with a replacement plan. Except now, they won't let anyone see it. They're guarding the draft repeal bill in a secret room away from the public. Instead of putting their proposal out in the open, after thousands stormed town halls demanding answers about their health coverage, they want to keep the details hidden -- to make it harder for any opposition to organize. We won't know how damaging it will be until the last minute, which means we must get resources ready to build enough counter pressure to stop it. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Even Donald Trump admitted "nobody knew health care could be so complicated." Yet Republicans continue to recklessly forge ahead on replacing Obamacare without a thorough process. They want to bring this bill to the floor as early as next week and bypass the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office's review -- and it's no wonder why: the CBO gave a terrible forecast for the last GOP health care proposal, citing millions losing insurance, premiums skyrocketing, and quality of care diminishing. No one has that mandate to jeopardize the health coverage of 32 million people by taking it into their own hands and treating it like a top secret. So to make sure this plan receives the scrutiny it deserves, we must be ready to act quickly and push back before Republicans force a vote.
